title: CAM, Trilegal act on Powerica ₹1,100 crore IPO
description: Powerica Limited has raised ₹1,100 crore from an initial public offering of equity shares which comprised a fresh issue aggregating to ₹700 crore and an offer for sale by promoter selling shareholders aggregating to ₹400 crore.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised Powerica and the promoter selling shareholders on this IPO.The transaction team consisted of Yash J Ashar (Senior Partner), Ravi Dubey (Partner, Regional Co-Head - Capital Markets - West), with support from Mansi Jhaveri (Principal Associa
